h-title: font-family: var(--body); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-primary);
src-row: display: flex; gap: 8px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 14px; padding-bottom: 4px;
src-domain: font-family: var(--body); font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-secondary); flex: 1; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;
src-title: font-family: var(--body); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-primary); line-height: 1.3; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden;
ans-label: font-family: var(--display); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; color: var(--text-tertiary); font-size: 9px; font-weight: 500; font-family: var(--display); letter-spacing: 0.2px;
